notes: Fixed incorrect import paths in three files: `@/components/ui/marquee` -> `@/components/marquee`, `@/components/ui/service-card` -> `@/components/service-card`. Also updated the ServiceCard usage in services/[slug]/page.tsx to pass the `service` object prop instead of spreading props, matching the actual component interface.
